page.title: Category:Airborne units and formations of Japan

revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「日本の空挺部隊のカテゴリ。 [[Category:日本の軍事|くうてい]] [[Category:空挺部隊|にほん]]」
revision.text:
日本の空挺部隊のカテゴリ。
[[Category:日本の軍事|くうてい]] [[Category:空挺部隊|にほん]]

revision.comment: Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[ja:Category:日本の空挺部隊]] [[ko:Category:일본의 공정부대]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:大日本帝国陸軍の空挺部隊]].

revision.comment: Bot: jawiki-title redirect to EN category

[[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]][[Category:Tier 1 Categories with enwiki]][[en:Airborne units and formations of Japan]][[Category:Tier 1 Categories with enwiki]][[en:Airborne units and formations of Japan]] [[Category:Airborne Forces (Japanese Empire)]] [[ja:Category:日本の空挺部隊]] [[ko:Category:일본의 공정부대]] [[en:Category:Airborne units and formations of Japan]] [[en:Category:Airborne units and formations of Japan]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[en:Category:Airborne units and formations of Japan]] [[en:Category:Airborne units and formations of Japan]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] {{translated page|ja|Category:日本の空挺部隊|version=95894374|comment=Imported full ja history}}

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{Pathnav|主題別分類|・・|日本の軍事|日本の部隊と編成|日本の特殊部隊|frame=1}}
日本の空挺部隊のカテゴリ。
{{translated page|ja|Category:日本の空挺部隊]]|version=95894374}} [[ja:Category:日本の空挺部隊]]
==Old Content== ==Japanese Content== {{Pathnav|主題別分類|・・|日本の軍事|日本の部隊と編成|日本の特殊部隊|frame=1}}
日本の空挺部隊のカテゴリ。
{{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:日本の空挺部隊]]}}
==Old Content== (2025-05-16T04:42:08Z): (Text replacement - "links on [[:Category" to "links on
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[:Category:Airborne Forces (Japanese Empire)]].
(2025-05-16T00:07:05Z): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on .
{{translated page|ja|Category:日本の空挺部隊|version=95894374|comment=Imported full ja history}}

revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - ": (Text replacement - "" to ""
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Text replacement - ")links on [[:Category" to "links on " to "== "

Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on ." to "[[Category:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on .]]"

Text replacement - "[[Category:[[Category:" to "[[Category:"
Text replacement - "↵]]↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
